/CAL:MISD BEHAVIOR COURT/JAVS/TEXT:DEFERD ENTRY OF JDGMNT; DEF ENTS GLTY PLEA & REFRD TO DIVERSN/TEXT:DEFT ADV & PERS WVS CONST & CITZ RTS ENT PLEAOF NL/DEFT ADV NL:2/NOLO/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/TWS/ARBUCKLE/X:THE DEFENDANT HAVING ENTERED A HARVEY WAIVER IN 19007406 IS ORDERED AS FOLLOWS:PAYRESTITUTION & ABIDE BY STAY AWAY ORDERS FROM THAT CASE/SAORD/SA2:24 RUSST, SF & 4TH ST & CLARA ST, SF/SAOR4 50/X CONDITIONS OF OR  /X MBHC INDIVIUALIZED TREATMENT PLAN WHICH WILL INCLUDE ANY MEDICATION RECOMMENDED BY A LICENSED PHYSICIAN WORKING WITH THE BHC & DPH, AS WELL AS MENTAL HEALTH & ORDRUG TREATMENT//WS/X:REVIEW AT 90 DAYS/DTC/WEAP/X:WAIVER OF CUSTODY CREDITS UP TO TODAY FOR PURPOSES OF MBHC ONLY/X:A MINIMUM OF ONE-YEAR OF SUCCESSFUL ADHERENCE TOTHE MBHC TREATMENT PLAN PRIOR TO SUCCESSFUL COMPLETION/RX/X:NO ALCOHOL/DTC/X:IF DEFT IS ARRESTED ON NEW CHARGES OR CPOVIOLATIONS,HE WILL BE IN VIOLATION OF THE CONDITIONS OF HIS OR AND MAY BE REMANDED INTO CUSTODY TO AWAIT A NEW PLACEMENT OR TREATMENT PLAN/X:IF DEFT IS PLACED INA RESIDENTIAL TREATMENT PROGRAM OR SUPPORTIVE HOUSING AND LEAVES WITHOUT AUTHORIZATION OR IS TERMINATED, HE WILL BE IN VIOLATION OF THE CONDITIONS OF OR AND MAY BE REMANDED INTO CUSTODY TO AWAIT A NEW PLACEMENT OR TREATMENT PLAN/X:IF DEFT FAILS TO ADHERE TO HIS MBHC INDIVIDUALIZED TREATMENT PLAN, HEWILLBE IN VIOLATION OF HIS OR AND MAY BE REMANDED INTO CUSTODY TO AWAIT A NEWTREATMENT PLAN/X:IF DEFT SUCC COMPLETES MBHC FOLLOWING AT LEAST 1 YEAR OF SUCCESSFUL ADHERENCE TO THE INDIVIDUALIZED TREATMENT PLAN AND NO NEW CHARGESOR SAO VIOLATIONS, THE DEJ PLEA WILL BE WITHDRAWN AND THE CHARGES DISMISSED/CONTD: MISDEMEANOR BEHAVIOR COURT REPORT/DOP/
